title: Codex Protocol Normalization And Affinity
problem: codex-helper should preserve sub2api-like relay capability by normalizing compressed request bodies and using prompt_cache_key for session affinity, without synthesizing upstream features.
gates: cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core request_content_encoding prompt_cache_key_affinity --no-fail-fast

continue_policy.notes: Closed after request content-encoding normalization, prompt_cache_key affinity, docs, and closeout gates passed. Split vendor fingerprinting, compact fallback, persisted passthrough config, or WebSocket frame compression into separate lanes.
